metadata.description: Agent Bridge Claude Code channel plugins and operational tools.

plugins.name: discord
plugins.description: Discord channel for Claude Code with Agent Bridge access control, reply-reference surfacing, and per-agent thread-as-session support.

plugins.name: teams
plugins.description: Microsoft Teams channel for Claude Code with Agent Bridge access control and setup integration.

plugins.name: ms365
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 / Graph API tools for Claude Code with Agent Bridge channel state and disclosure policy integration.

plugins.name: mattermost
plugins.description: Mattermost channel for Claude Code with Agent Bridge access control via Outgoing Webhooks and Bot API.
